main_heading.title: Police Departments & Stations
main_heading.subtitle: Manage all police departments and stations across governorates

table_heading.title: Manage Police Departments & Stations
table_heading.subtitle: Use the table and filters below to view, edit, and manage all police departments and stations

add_police_station.title: Add New Police Department/Station
add_police_station.description: Create a new police department or station and link it to the appropriate governorate.

visible.label: Visible Stations
visible.subtext: Police stations currently visible to users

not_visible.label: Hidden Stations
not_visible.subtext: Police stations not visible to users

total.label: Total Stations
total.subtext: Total number of all police departments and stations in the system

delete.title: Delete Confirmation
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this police department or station? This action cannot be undone.

add.title: Add New Police Department/Station
add.description: Create a new police department or station and link it to the governorate.

view.title: View Police Department/Station Details
view.description: Here you can view all details about this police department or station.

edit.title: Edit Police Department/Station
edit.description: Update the details of the police department or station.
